backstory.original: Bobby is the youngest of the group that was transported to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. As a brave and loyal Barbarian, he wields a powerful magical club that enhances his strength. Bobby has close ties to his sister Sheila and his pet unicorn, Uni. Despite his impulsiveness, Bobby's courage and determination are key assets in the search to find the way back home.
backstory.display: 鲍比是被传送到龙与地下城神奇世界的人中最年轻的。他是个勇敢而忠诚的野蛮人，挥舞着一根威力无穷的魔力木棒。鲍比和他的姐姐希拉以及他的独角兽宠物“独角”非常亲近。尽管鲍比很冲动，但他将用自己的勇气和决心来寻找回家的路。

description.original: Bobby swings his club at the closest enemy.
description.display: 鲍比挥舞棍棒打向最近的敌人。

description.original: Bobby strikes the ground with his club, stunning and knocking back all enemies.
description.display: 鲍比用棍棒击打地面，眩晕所有敌人并将他们击退。

longDescription.original: Bobby strikes the ground with his club, knocking all enemies up and back and stunning them for 5 seconds.
longDescription.display: 鲍比用棍棒击打地面，将所有敌人击飞并击退，眩晕他们 5 秒。

description.desc: Bobby's base chance to Critical Hit is $(amount)%.
鲍比造成暴击的基础概率为 $(amount)%.
Bobby increases his damage by $(amount)% for each column behind him, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一列队友在他身后，鲍比的伤害就增加$(amount)% ，以乘算方式堆叠。

Uni takes her place next to Bobby. Uni increases the damage of Bobby and all other Champions next to her by $(amount___2)%. If Uni is in Dungeon Master's formation slot, this is further increased by $(amount___5)%.
独角在鲍比身边。独角使鲍比和所有与她相邻的勇士伤害提高$(amount___2)%.如果独角在地下城主的阵型栏位中，该增益会额外提高$(amount___5)%.

tipText.original: Bobby's pet unicorn Uni supports all Champions that are next to her.
tipText.display: 鲍比的宠物独角兽“独角”会支援所有她身旁的勇士。

description.desc: Whenever Bobby lands a Critical Hit, the effect of Charge Into Battle is increased by $(amount)%, stacking multiplicatively up to 10 times and resetting when changing areas.
每次鲍比造成暴击时，“冲锋陷阵”的效果都会提高 $(amount)%, %，以乘算方式堆叠，最多 10 层；在变更区域后重置。
Bobby gains the Control role and he increases his damage by $(amount)%. When Bobby scores a Critical Hit, the enemies are also knocked back and stunned for 5 seconds.
鲍比获得控制者角色，他的伤害提高 $(amount)%。当鲍比造成暴击时，敌人会被击退并眩晕 5 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Bobby impulsively focuses on his damage dealing role by stunning his opponents when he scores critical hits.
specializationDescription.display: 鲍比冲动地专注于他的伤害输出角色，在他造成暴击时击晕对手。

description.desc: Bobby's Charge Into Battle now also increases the damage of all Champions behind Bobby by $(amount)% of the buff it provides to Bobby.
现在，鲍比的冲锋陷阵也会增加鲍比身后所有勇士的伤害，伤害值是鲍比所获得增益效果的 $(amount)% 。

specializationDescription.original: Bobby bravely focuses on his support role by leading the heroes behind him into the battle.
specializationDescription.display: 鲍比勇敢地专注于他的支援角色，带领身后的英雄们冲锋陷阵。

description.desc: Bobby can help scavenge up to $(current_scavenge_cap bobby_scale_scavenger floor) additional Scales of Tiamat from boss loot sacks. While this cap is not reached, Bobby has a $amount% chance of scavenging 10 Scales of Tiamat each time a boss drops a loot bag. The cap increases by $cap_increase_per_day every day.

conditions.desc: ^^Scales of Tiamat Scavenged: $(stat_value_unformatted bobby_scales_collected 0 none) ($(stat_value_unformatted bobby_scales_collected_this_adventure 1 none) this adventure)

description.desc: 鲍比可以从首领战利品口袋中额外收集最多 $(current_scavenge_cap bobby_scale_scavenger floor) 提亚马特龙鳞。未达上限时，每次首领掉落一个战利品袋子，普鲍比有 $amount% 几率获得 10 块提亚马特龙鳞。此上限每天增加 $cap_increase_per_day 。

conditions.desc: ^^已回收提亚马特龙鳞：$(stat_value_unformatted bobby_scales_collected 0 none)（$(stat_value_unformatted bobby_scales_collected_this_adventure 1 none) 此冒险）

tipText.original: Bobby has a chance to uncover Scales of Tiamat with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.
tipText.display: 鲍比有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现提亚马特龙鳞碎片，上限随日期提升。

description.desc: Bobby increases the effect of his first Specialization choice by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a total ability score of 78 or less, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位总属性值低于或等于 78 的勇士，鲍比令他的第一个专精选择的效果提高 $(amount)% %，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Bobby focuses on Champions who have low total ability scores.
specializationDescription.display: 鲍比专注于那些总属性值较低的勇士。

description.desc: Bobby increases the effect of his first Specialization choice by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation that is 20 years old or younger, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位 20 岁或以下的勇士，鲍比令他的第一个专精选择的效果提高 $(amount)% %，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Bobby works best with other young Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 鲍比最适合与其他年轻勇士合作。

description.desc: Bobby increases the effect of his first Specialization choice by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a Strength of 15 or higher, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位力量高于或等于 15 的勇士，鲍比令他的第一个专精选择的效果提高 $(amount)% %，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Bobby flexes his muscles with other strong Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 鲍比会和其他强大的勇士一起展示肌肉。

description.original: I'm not old enough to go inside - but I'll kick your butt in the street!
description.display: 我还没到能进去的年纪——但我可以在街上狠狠揍你一顿！

description.original: You won't BELIEVE how far I'm gonna throw you!
description.display: 你不会相信我能把你扔出去多远！

description.original: Okay, Uni. You go around and distract them. I'll bonk 'em on the head!
description.display: 好吧，独角。你绕过去分散他们的注意力。我去敲他们的脑袋！

description.original: I've fought a battle or two before - don't worry!
description.display: 我以前打过几场仗——不用担心！

description.original: Now we're talking!
description.display: 这才像话嘛！

description.original: You'll have to go through me to get to Uni!
description.display: 要想碰独角，得先过我这一关！

description.original: Uh, usually Hank handles this stuff. But - we can do this! I know it!
description.display: 呃，通常这种事都是交给汉克。但是——我们可以做到的！我知道！

description.original: Don't worry - I'll go in first and you all sweep up!
description.display: 别担心——我先冲，然后你们扫荡！

description.original: Kelek can't stop all of us! Let's GO!
description.display: 科列克不可能挡住我们所有人！上啊！

description.original: FOR UNI!
description.display: 为了独角！

description.original: You're always getting into so much trouble, Uni. But we still love you!
description.display: 你总是搞得自己麻烦缠身，独角。但我们还是爱你！

effects.description: Increases the base damage of Bobby's Uni, The Unicorn ability by $amount%

description.original: Uni, RUN! I'll protect you!
description.display: 独角，快跑！我来保护你！

effects.description: Increases the base damage of Bobby's Uni, The Unicorn ability by $amount%

description.original: Go with Dungeon Master. He'll keep you safe, okay?
description.display: 跟地下城主走。他会保你平安的，好吗？

effects.description: Increases the damage boost Bobby's Uni, The Unicorn ability receives when Uni is in Dungeon Master's slot by $amount%

description.original: I'm just like that one barbarian from that movie!
description.display: 我就像那部电影里的那个野蛮人！

description.original: Just because I'm small doesn't mean I can't lift this boulder!
description.display: 别因为我个子小就以为我举不起这石头！

effects.description: Increases the max stacks of Now We're Talking by $amount%

description.original: NO ONE TREATS UNI LIKE THAT!
description.display: 不许对独角动粗！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Bobby's Stunning Strength and Group Charge specializations by $amount%.

description.original: All right, so we take turns picking players. Then you'll decide...
description.display: 好嘞，我们轮流选队员。然后你决定……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Bobby's Not So Low, Still Growing Up, and Strong Armed specializations by $amount%.

description.original: I may be short now - but I'm not done growing!
description.display: 我现在是很矮，但我还在长高呢！

description.original: Heroes never say die!
description.display: 英雄永不言弃！

description.original: You wanna guess how many baddies I've bashed with this club?
description.display: 你要不要猜猜我用这根棍子揍过多少坏蛋了？

description.original: The best games are the ones where the rules are different every time you play!
description.display: 最好的游戏是每次你玩时规则都不一样的游戏！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Bobby's Not So Low, Still Growing Up, and Strong Armed specializations by $amount%.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Bobby is the youngest of the group that was transported to the magical world of Dungeons & Dragons. As a brave and loyal Barbarian, he wields a powerful magical club that enhances his strength. Bobby has close ties to his sister Sheila and his pet unicorn, Uni. Despite his impulsiveness, Bobby's courage and determination are key assets in the search to find the way back home.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Bobby is a DPS and Support character who prefers to be on the front-line, as his abilities are increased for each column behind him.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 鲍比是被传送到龙与地下城神奇世界的人中最年轻的。他是个勇敢而忠诚的野蛮人，挥舞着一根威力无穷的魔力木棒。鲍比和他的姐姐希拉以及他的独角兽宠物“独角”非常亲近。尽管鲍比很冲动，但他将用自己的勇气和决心来寻找回家的路。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 鲍比是一名伤害输出型与支援型角色，他更喜欢待在前线，因为每有一列队友在他身后，他的技能效果就会增强。

display.name: 雷霆棒

original.description: Bobby strikes the ground with his club, stunning and knocking back all enemies.
original.long_description: Bobby strikes the ground with his club, knocking all enemies up and back and stunning them for 5 seconds.

display.name: 集体冲锋
